description.value: Price 1,500 gp; Slot wrist; CL 3rd; Weight —; Aura moderate conjuration DESCRIPTION A copper disc attached to this bracelet bears the image of a figure in religious garb. The wearer gains a +1 deflection bonus to AC and a +1 resistance bonus on saves. These bonuses apply only against attacks made or effects created by extraplanar creatures. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 750 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; protection from chaos, evil, good, or law
